column1: # PURPOSE: test whether blending base model into EMA weights beats pure EMA.
# Baseline (pure EMA) = current behavior. Sweep alpha=EMA_weight.
# alpha=1.0 → pure EMA (baseline, same as s32); 0.7, 0.5, 0.3 → progressively more base.
# Uses seed 1337 to pair with s32_baseline3k_seed1337 (same config, only knob varies).
# DECISION: best alpha must beat alpha=1.0 by ≥0.003 BPB (2σ at 3000 steps, if σ≈0.008).
# Re-use: if winner, queue 2 more seeds at winning alpha to confirm ≥N=3.

column2: QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 MATRIX_LR=0.042 EMA_BLEND_ALPHA=0.7 ITERATIONS=3000 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=6000 TIMEOUT_SECS=7200 FAST_SMOKE=0 SEED=1337
